collections.name: Summer 2026
collections.subtitle: Light & Breezy
collections.description: Embrace the warmth with our curated summer collection featuring breathable linens, light cottons, and effortless silhouettes.

collections.name: The Minimal Edit
collections.subtitle: Less is More
collections.description: Clean lines, neutral palettes, and timeless designs. Our minimal edit focuses on quality over quantity.

collections.name: Modern Workwear
collections.subtitle: Office to Evening
collections.description: Sophisticated pieces that transition seamlessly from desk to dinner. Tailored for the modern professional.

about.title: RM
about.subtitle: Crafted with intention. Designed for life.
about.story: Founded in 2019, Roger McDaniels was born from a simple belief: that exceptional quality and timeless design should be accessible to everyone. We partner with artisans and ethical manufacturers around the world to create pieces that last.

values.title: Sustainable
values.description: We use eco-friendly materials and ethical production practices.

values.title: Quality First
values.description: Every piece is crafted to last, not just for a season.

values.title: Community
values.description: We believe in building relationships, not just transactions.

testimonials.name: Amara Boateng
testimonials.quote: The quality completely surprised me. Fits perfectly and feels like it'll last for years.

testimonials.name: Julian Ferreira
testimonials.quote: Shipping was fast and the linen overshirt is now on constant rotation in my closet.

testimonials.name: Priya Nair
testimonials.quote: Clean, minimal, and comfortable. Exactly what I was looking for in everyday essentials.

testimonials.name: Daniel Osei
testimonials.quote: Customer support was great when I needed to exchange a size. Will shop here again.

faq.question: What is your return policy?
faq.answer: We offer a 7-day return window on all unworn items with tags attached. Refunds are processed within 5 business days of receiving your return.

faq.question: How long does shipping take?
faq.answer: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days within Ghana. Free shipping applies to all orders over GH₵900.

faq.question: Do you ship internationally?
faq.answer: No, unfortunately. I only deliver within the country. Send me message if you want me to deliver outside the country.

faq.question: How do I find my size?
faq.answer: Check our Size Guide linked in the footer for detailed measurements for every category we carry.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out for support, partnerships, or just to say hello.
